description_short: Luxuriously soft pillow cases to ensure your beauty sleep while protecting your hair and skin.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, iron on low.

faq_specs.question: Is the fabric hypoallergenic?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, our satin pillow cases are made from hypoallergenic material.

faq_specs.question: Can I buy just one pillow case?
faq_specs.answer: Currently, they are available in packs of two.

notes_observed: Beauty-positioned: 'protect hair and skin, reduce wrinkles, frizz-free hair'. Distinct from satin-weave 300TC sateen — this is polyester satin not cotton.
